title: Broad Mean-Reversion Reentry
hypothesis: A short-horizon mean-reversion family is materially different from the retired broad-momentum branches and is the cleanest repo-backed next family that can be queued without inventing unsupported model features.
why_different_from_retired: The retired broad families all remained inside the cross-sectional momentum engine, while this proposal switches the strategy family to mean reversion with a shorter signal horizon and equal weighting.
This branch gives the research runtime one governed non-momentum family to compare against the exhausted broad-momentum queue instead of reopening local momentum tweaks.
success_criteria: The seed must pass the existing promotion policy without exceptions before it can move toward paper-trade preparation.
If it remains non-promotable, it must still produce enough evidence to accept or retire mean reversion as a family rather than leaving the queue empty by accident.

stop_conditions.when: The mean-reversion seed passes validation, holdout, and walk-forward promotion rules under the current policy.
The seed records a terminal promotion decision and still fails the policy, especially on benchmark-relative split or walk-forward evidence.

bootstrap.objective: Run one bounded non-momentum family that is materially different from the exhausted broad-momentum queue and decide whether mean reversion deserves promotion-path follow-up or retirement.
bootstrap.branch_rationale: The governed queue is intentionally empty after retiring the broad-momentum branches. The repo already contains a mean-reversion engine, so this proposal chooses the cleanest materially different family that can be executed without adding unsupported model features.
positive_hypotheses: Short-horizon mean reversion can attack the late-period holdout weakness from a genuinely different signal family instead of re-tuning the exhausted momentum branch.
A broader 12-position basket with a 14-day rebalance cadence gives the first approved non-momentum branch a cleaner execution profile than the previously tested 21-day seed.

seed_stack.label: Retired broad momentum control
seed_stack.rationale: Reference control for the exhausted broad-momentum family.

seed_stack.label: Mean-reversion seed
seed_stack.rationale: Repo-backed materially different family using the existing mean-reversion implementation with a fresh profile identity and faster cadence.

campaign_path.label: Mean-Reversion Seed
campaign_path.purpose: Execute the first governed non-momentum family and decide whether it should be promoted or retired.
